channel.title: Google on Raelize - Embedded Device Security Testing, Consultancy & Training
channel.description: Recent content in Google on Raelize - Embedded Device Security Testing, Consultancy & Training

item.title: AI-FI: Reproducing adb to root on Google's TV Streamer using Claude in less than 15 minutes
item.description: We reproduce our 2025 hardwear.io research where an ElectroMagnetic (EM) glitch escalates privilege from the adb shell to root on Google’s TV Streamer 4K. This time we let Claude Code drive the whole software stack: Keysight Spider SDK, Keysight Inspector XYZ stage, YEPKIT YKUSH3, attack binaries, dashboards, wikis. We never touched any code.

item.title: setresuid(⚡): Glitching Google's TV Streamer from adb to root
item.description: We attacked Google’s TV Streamer 4K with an ElectroMagnetic Fault Injection (EMFI) glitch on the Mediatek MT8696’s CPU. From an unprivileged adb shell, a single EM glitch during setresuid syscall makes the Linux kernel commit credentials with uid = 0. This is our hardwear.io NL 2025 talk in long form.
